hero.subtitle: Structured onboarding, spaced repetition flashcards and manager visibility — all in one system for every growing business.
hero.social: 14-day free trial · No credit card required

features.subtitle: Not a generic LMS. Not an HRIS. Built for any business that grows and wants to give new people a solid start.

items.title: Structured onboarding
items.desc: Build templates with phases, steps and content blocks. Every new hire gets the same solid start.

items.title: Spaced repetition
items.desc: ANKI-style flashcards built into onboarding. Knowledge sticks because it's repeated at the right moment.

items.title: Manager visibility
items.desc: At-risk detection, quiz scores, flashcard accuracy. Know who's struggling before the 30-day review.

items.title: Live in 60 seconds
items.desc: Pick a template, assign a manager, set a start date. Your first onboarding is running within a minute.

items.title: Role-specific templates
items.desc: Fully customizable templates per role — whether you're onboarding CS, Sales, Operators or anything else. Each role gets content that matches the real work.

items.title: Manager approvals
items.desc: Block progress until a manager signs off. Ensure standards are met before moving to the next phase.

pricing.subtitle: Per active onboardee. Pay only when someone is actively onboarding. Managers and admins always free.

cta.title: Ready for better onboarding?
cta.subtitle: Every growing business deserves structured onboarding. 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
cta.note: 14 days free · No credit card required
